description: Mutate a malloc() call in target-b source (dynarray.c, bstree.c, or strmap.c) to omit a header or metadata size component from the allocation, resulting in a buffer too small for the full structure and an overflow on field writes.

metadata.notes: Targets malloc() call sites in dynarray.c, bstree.c, and strmap.c — reduces the allocation size argument to produce a heap buffer overflow on subsequent writes.
